title: Atout coeur à Tokyo pour OSS 117
writer: Jean Bruce, Terence Young, Pierre Foucaud
actors: Frederick Stafford, Marina Vlady, Jitsuko Yoshimura
plot: After an American Navy base is annihilated by a secret weapon, Agent OSS 117 is sent to Japan to investigate the organization that's claiming responsibility, and threatening the US with another attack, if they don't pay.
